allow: Bash(which gh || apt-get install -y gh 2>&1 || snap install gh 2>&1)

Bash(echo "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reports \(
  id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
  mission_id VARCHAR NOT NULL REFERENCES missions\(id\) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Cuve 1',
  template_data JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Migrate existing templateData from missions to reports
INSERT INTO reports \(id, mission_id, title, template_data, created_at, updated_at\)
SELECT gen_random_uuid\(\), id, 'Cuve 1', template_data, created_at, updated_at
FROM missions WHERE template_data IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
" | psql "$DATABASE_URL" 2>&1)
Bash(echo "SELECT id, mission_id, title, created_at FROM reports;" | psql "$DATABASE_URL" 2>&1)
